title: Quran, Sura 33: Al-Ahzab
description: Sura 33 (Al-Ahzab: The Combined Forces) from the Holy Quran.
introduction: Sura 33 (Al-Ahzab: The Combined Forces) from the Holy Quran.

translation.text: O Prophet, fear God and do not obey the disbelievers and the hypocrites. Indeed, God is ever Knowing and Wise.
